AR1.justification: No routing was performed — the agent correctly recognized this was a procedural halt with no commitment, observation, or followup yet to record, but did not articulate that routing rationale; arguably should have logged a daybook note for the stall.

AR2.justification: Verified factors.md absent via directory inspection, stalled visibly, named the missing input, and offered three unblocking paths including an explicit user-override option — fully artifact-bound discipline.

AR3.justification: All file references are relative paths (runbooks/incident-postmortem/AGENTS.md, tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-04-23-staging-rollback/...) and resolve in the staged workspace.

AR4.justification: No writes to the workspace, so re-running is trivially idempotent — nothing to conflict or duplicate.
